## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflow, and image integration for blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two calibration articles completed; Aftershoot team to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Content OS updated with new keywords; team to refine and prioritize topics](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Image integration for blog posts presents a challenge; exploring various solutions including AI-generated, stock, and community-sourced images](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Publishing process and workflow refinement ongoing to reduce friction and scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [David added keywords from Aftershoot's research into the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Created new assignments and topics, focusing on batching similar low-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Aftershoot team to review Content OS:](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Mark unwanted topics with 'X' for removal](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [Provide feedback on two completed calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Team to refine and prioritize topics for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Opportunities

  - [Suggestion to leverage product info and transcripts for additional keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue exploring competitive research and other sources for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Balance between scaling current prioritized lanes and exploring new content avenues](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### Blog Image Integration

  - [Three typical approaches discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
    1.  Stock image libraries or client-provided assets
    2.  AI-generated images (e.g., using Recraft)
    3.  Hybrid approach combining brand elements with AI-generated images
  - [Aftershoot's current process:](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [Manual image selection](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
      - [Cover images: mostly stock with some custom additions](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [In-article images: context-specific, often sourced from relevant websites or photographers](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Exploring solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
      - [GrowthX working on an AI-powered image selection tool (estimated 2 weeks away)](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Potential for community-sourced images from Aftershoot's Facebook group](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Aftershoot to share folders of pre-approved images from contributing photographers](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)

### Team Introduction and Meeting Logistics

  - [Jacob introduced as new Managing Director at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Discussion about potentially adjusting meeting time to accommodate all participants](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aftershoot team to review and provide feedback on two calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Aftershoot to refine Content OS by marking unwanted topics and prioritizing preferred ones](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of different image integration approaches](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Explore community-sourced image options for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [Aftershoot to share folders of pre-approved images from contributing photographers](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue developing AI-powered image selection tool](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Follow-up after the meeting to confirm this week's action items](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Reconvene next week to discuss progress and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/uaGxKLGgsmNKbjazPoiV6U262Ao2ZuSF?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
